title: Arcus rolls out 24/7 tokenized US stocks and perpetual markets on Robinhood Chain
snippet: Arcus rolled out 24/7 trading for over 95 Stock Tokens on Robinhood Chain and also introduced beta perpetual markets with USDG collateral.

title: Jito rolls out JTX self-custodial trading platform for Solana tokens and RWAs
snippet: Jito Labs launched JTX, a self-custodial Solana trading platform with spot trading for tokens and tokenized RWAs.

title: Augustus raises $180 million to build a clearing bank for the AI and stablecoin era

snippet: A cross-party group is examining why UK banks block accounts and payments for crypto firms—and whether it's holding the sector back.

title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
snippet: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.

title: Base’s 1:1-backed tokenized equities launch ‘imminent,’ Pollak says
snippet: The Coinbase-backed Ethereum layer-2 is preparing to expand its financial offerings as it pivots away from its earlier social-first strategy.

title: Western Union launches stablecard
snippet: Western Union has launched its stablecoin wallet and card in partnership with Visa and Rain.

title: UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector’s banking challenges
snippet: This comes weeks after the publication of the UK’s new crypto regulatory framework, set to take effect in October 2027.

title: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator
snippet: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.

title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027: FT
snippet: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.

title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol Midnight on Base to expand onchain credit markets
snippet: Morpho has launched Midnight, a fixed-rate, fixed-term lending protocol on Base that complements its existing variable-rate lending protocol.

title: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
snippet: A UK parliamentary group launched an inquiry into banking restrictions on crypto firms and consumers, including their impact on investment and competition.

title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
snippet: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

title: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
snippet: The recognition allows regulated firms in Abu Dhabi Global Market to offer services involving Tether Gold as tokenized commodities gain broader adoption.

title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
snippet: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

title: Trump agrees to ethics provision as crypto bill inches closer to Senate vote
snippet: President Trump has agreed to ethics language — potentially moving the ball forward to getting crypto legislation passed into law.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
snippet: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.
